title: Functions, duties and powers of Chief of State

content.text: The Chief of State shall exercise such powers and perform such duties as conferred to him or her pursuant to this Constitution or law.
In exercising the powers or duties under clause

, the Chief of State shall perform all other functions to be performed by him or her on recommendation and with the consent of the State Council of Ministers than those functions specifically provided to be performed on recommendation of any body or official pursuant to this Constitution or law. Such recommendation and consent shall be submitted through the Chief Minister.
Any decision or order to be issued in the name of the Chief of State under clause
and other instrument of authorization pertaining thereto shall be authenticated as provided for in the State law.
